GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "How this fashion stylist gets her glowing, glossy skin", "Fashion stylist Nicole Bonython-Hines's long resume includes styling some of the world's most beautiful women, a role she has held for the past four decades. While she is often credited with taking Kylie Minogue from Neighbours actor to pop princess, the mother of five's own style is a far cry from gold hot pants. She's famed for telling a story in the images she captures, but her own wardrobe is simple and streamlined. Her beauty regimen is the same. A smart, skin-centred routine that's been honed over time. "I'm religious about my skincare. I don't spend a lot of my time on it, but I am consistent. I'm 58, so of course, I want my skin to be as healthy and glowing, as smooth and plump, as possible," she told Vogue. Bonython-Hines adds that her signature blonde ponytail started feeling decidedly less swishy since she turned 50 too. Those traits made her a perfect candidate to trial Vida Glow's new Collagen Elixir, a concentrated dose of bioavailable marine collagen which is designed to boost a daily collagen intake with a convenient portioned 30mL dose. The fact that collagen production in the body begins to decrease at a rate of 2 per cent a year by the mid-twenties is well documented. It means that by the age of 50, there's a loss of over half the amount of collagen. The pre-portioned palm-sized bottles of Vida Glow Collagen Elixir equates to 5000mg of marine collagen and is recommended to be taken once-daily. We set the busy stylist the task of committing to a Collagen Elixir routine for six weeks, to see what would happen to her skin, as well as to her hair and nails. Vida Glow's potent marine collagen has proven efficacy at improving healthy skin function from within — smoothing fine lines and wrinkles, and boosting skin elasticity and firmness. It also promotes stronger, thicker, shinier hair and nails. Within her first week of daily Vida Glow Collagen Elixir, Bonython-Hines says she noticed changes. "The impact was almost immediate. I know that sounds crazy, but I really saw it early on," she says. Nicole says it was the compliments from friends that alerted her to the shift in her skin — her complexion was softer, bouncier, plumper and radiant. "My friends — people my age — were asking what I'd had done," she laughs. The unique taste — made with Australian botanicals like lemon myrtle and manuka honey — was also a pleasant surprise for the stylist. "It's a really lovely taste. I was sticking mostly with having it in the early part of the day, but I liked that I could throw it in my bag and have it wherever I was, too. Very easy and convenient," she explains. Six weeks in, Bonython-Hines is keeping an eye out for new baby hairs to join her long blonde mane, and she's feeling better than ever. "My son and my husband would never notice anything, but my daughter — always my biggest fan — thinks my skin looks so much better," she adds. We'll consider this trial a success. Shop Vida Glow's new Collagen Elixir here."
